CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT, input_string CLOB);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (8, ' special char & symbols #! ');
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (9, CAST(RPAD('a', 1000, 'a') AS CLOB));
CREATE TABLE string_hashes AS SELECT id, sys.md5(input_string) AS hash FROM test_strings;
SELECT * FROM string_hashes WHERE hash IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, sys.md5(input_string) FROM test_strings WHERE LENGTH(input_string) > 0;
SELECT t1.id, t1.input_string, t2.hash FROM test_strings AS t1 JOIN string_hashes AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t1.input_string LIKE '%special%';
SELECT id, sys.md5(CONCAT(input_string, 'suffix')) AS modified_hash FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, sys.md5(CAST(NULL AS CLOB)) AS null_hash FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, sys.md5(input_string) AS original_hash, sys.md5(CONCAT(input_string, input_string)) AS concatenated_hash FROM test_strings;
